title: Firestore Schema & Complete Seed Data
description: Complete Firestore collection schema with indexes and comprehensive seed data for all 11 countries and ~75 OpCos. Covers TASK-004, TASK-005, TASK-104. Currently: 18 collections in collections.py, seed.py creates partial data (15 OpCos instead of 75, missing legal_entities/customers collections). Audit needed: missing collections vs ARC-FINAL data model, missing indexes, incomplete seed.
assumptions: ARC-FINAL data model is authoritative for collection schema
75 OpCo records needed per project.md 1.2

title: Master Data Structures (without Warsaw)
description: Create Firestore collections and seed scripts for legal_entities, customers, sales_types master data. No Warsaw access - build structures with realistic mock data. Covers TASK-101, TASK-102, TASK-103. Audit: what master data fields buying service eligibility rules need, what BQ temp_invoice fields reference master data.

key_results.metric: Master data collections with seed data

key_results.description: Seed scripts create realistic test data for PL, NL, DE countries

assumptions: Warsaw BigQuery access not available
Master data fields must match buying service expectations

title: Config & Settings (API + Frontend)

key_results.description: Settings page matches pages/04-settings.md with all 3 sections

title: RBAC & Auth Completeness

title: Buying Service Core (Eligibility + Auto-Buy)

title: Notification Service (Emails)

title: Advanced Features (Queue, Credit Limits, Priority)

title: Audit Trail Completeness
